confidence.label: moderate
confidence.rationale: High but not maximum sacred-political-order strength: the founding documents establish strong sacral logic (divine favor, racial hierarchy as natural truth), but the four-year lifespan and dependence on military success suggest the order could not fully consolidate. Score of 4 reflects high founding strength with fragility built in.

reviewNote: Score value 4/5 defensible: high sacred-political-order-strength in the founding Confederate order (CSA Constitution's slavery permanence clause, Stephens Cornerstone Speech) supports elevated but not maximum score — the order collapsed too quickly to sustain escalation to 5. Confidence 0.62 reflects the chain-requires-expansion uncertainty. Hold at score-review until chain expansion to ≥4 passages.
